meaning: n.(供煎食的)德国式小香肠
examples: Long lines formed to ride a Ferris wheel set up amid beer and bratwurst stands on the tarmac.
Aramark came along, and now Heinrich can get a bratwurst and beer at his seat in stadiums from Hamburg to Nuremberg.
In Germany, where people pig out on bratwurst and don't seem to slam away a whole lot of salad, the economy is thriving.
